This template is for PRs implementing a `type:new-assistant` or
`type:vendor-evolution` issue. The structured information about the
vendor change lives on the linked issue, not here. Read
`docs/ASSISTANT-ONBOARDING.md` and `docs/REVIEW-CHECKLIST-ASSISTANT-CHANGE.md`
before opening the PR.
-->

Closes #<issue-number>

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph describing what this PR changes. Detailed rationale
lives on the issue. -->

## Reviewer notes

- [ ] Issue is at `phase:review` (or moves there when this PR is ready).
- [ ] (vendor-evolution only) The matching `kind:*` label is on the issue.
- [ ] CI has produced a fresh DMG and the sticky build comment is up to
      date on **both** the PR and the linked issue.
- [ ] Vendor doc (`docs/vendors/<vendor>.md`) is bumped with `Last
      verified: <today>` and the Change log is updated.
- [ ] Reviewer checklist
      (`docs/REVIEW-CHECKLIST-ASSISTANT-CHANGE.md`) walked.

## Test plan

<!-- Checklist of what the reviewer can do locally to validate the
change beyond CI. The tester gate happens after `phase:testing` and is
tracked on the issue, not here. -->
